title: It's possible to create a Marketplace app with custom collumn?
excerpt: When adding a new column, you have the option to add two Marketplace Apps that create a custom column. Is it possible to create this, or is it only available for certain restricted partners? In the Developer Center, ther…

posts.author: Makedrive (Makedrive)
posts.cookedHtml: When adding a new column, you have the option to add two Marketplace Apps that create a custom column. Is it possible to create this, or is it only available for certain restricted partners? In the Developer Center, there is no option to create a column as a resource, and the documentation doesn’t mention anything about it.

posts.author: rob (Roberto Tremonti)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Makedrive
Can you tell me what apps can create custom columns?
As far as I know custom columns cannot be created yet.

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
@rob These two from Spot-nik & Jetpack:

Screenshot 2025-03-26 at 19.53.571920×1288 99 KB

@Makedrive do you have any apps on the marketplace yet?

posts.author: rob (Roberto Tremonti)
posts.cookedHtml:
I think they are related to this functionality:

Apps Framework

Board column extension

Learn about the app feature, supported column types, how to build a board column extension, and relevant SDK methods

It’s not really a custom column, but an addon you can see in the column menu.

posts.author: Makedrive (Makedrive)
posts.cookedHtml: @dvdsmpsn I have custom-built apps on the marketplace, not public, a custom column would solve a lot of problems.

posts.author: drcproengenharia (DRCPro)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m talking about theapp “Workflow”. They do have a costum column and this feature “Board Column Extension” does not seem to be related to their feature, because their feature does’nt even appears as a column extension, but with whole new stuff and settings. See the prints

Screenshot_11300×754 53.6 KB

Screenshot_2966×495 29.5 KB

Screenshot_31127×620 62 KB

posts.author: rob (Roberto Tremonti)
posts.cookedHtml:
Do I miss something?
It seems exactly what the board column extension does.
You can extend the board menu of specific column types to open custom windows.
Currently you can’t create new column types, if this is what you are looking for.

posts.author: drcproengenharia (DRCPro)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s exactly the point. Opening custom menus is something we have managed to do acoording the monday apps docs, but the custom options inside that status column provided by the app “workflow” (bottom of the options modal) and the “workflow settings” being presented as an option at the column settings is something the docs does not talk about and it’s precisely what we want to do.

posts.author: Makedrive (Makedrive)
posts.cookedHtml: I tried contacting Monday through the chat to ask how to develop new column types, and they directed me to create a topic in the community. I’m hoping someone from the official Monday team can respond here to clarify whether this is actually possible, or if it’s only allowed for those two people. I’d also like to know if there are any specific requirements to be allowed to create custom column types.

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Makedrive @rob It’s part of an open beta. Details here:

Public beta group - Open status column picker & drop-down monday Apps & Developers
We’re excited to announce that our beta group is now public for testing a new feature: the Open Status Column Picker and Dropdown. This feature lets you: Create custom status columns that users can select from the column store. Customize the status dropdown interface when users interact with a status cell If you’d like to try it before its official release and provide feedback, please fill out this form, and we’ll add you to the beta.
